task.title: Block imported apply when dry-run has no changes

requirements.description: When dry-run reports zero changed fields, disable apply action and show no-op guidance if apply is attempted.
acceptance: Apply button is disabled when changedCount is 0
applyImportedReportToEditor exits with no-op guidance when changedCount is 0
Existing apply/undo behavior remains unchanged for changedCount > 0
constraints: Only modify the lab project under G:\codexęµ‹čÆ•
Do not change production project files
Keep validation local to modified lab files
